bulkImportDescription: Upload a JSON file containing questions with koreanPrompt, scrambledChunks, and correctSentence fields.
storyImportDescription: Paste a story, paragraph, or raw text. The editor will automatically divide it into sentences, generate scrambled chunks for each sentence, and add them as new questions.
storyImportPlaceholder: Once upon a time, there was a little bird...
clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag & drop

question.addMediaHint: Add an image, video or audio to your question

config.answerTimeHint: Time players have to build the sentence

question.deleteQuestionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this question?

mismatchWarning: The scrambled chunks do not match the correct sentence. Please check spelling, punctuation, or wording.
saveMismatchConfirm:
Warning: The chunks for question(s) {{questions}} do not match their correct sentences. If you save, players may be graded incorrectly on those questions.

Do you want to save anyway?
importMismatchWarning: Import Warning: The chunks for question(s) {{questions}} do not match their correct sentences. Please check them.
previewMismatchPlaceholder: Cannot display preview: scrambled chunks do not align with the correct sentence.
